final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing educational infographic card for children explaining the Battle of Red Cliffs from the Three Kingdoms period.

Style/medium: flat vector illustration, children's educational infographic style, friendly cartoon aesthetic with simplified character designs
Composition: single large knowledge card layout, title banner at top, main story illustration occupying center-left, bullet points column on right side
Subject: Three Kingdoms Battle of Red Cliffs (赤壁之战), featuring simplified cartoon depictions of Zhuge Liang, Zhou Yu, and the fire attack on Cao Cao's fleet
Scene/backdrop: dramatic river battle scene with burning ships, simplified cartoon clouds and water, clear visual storytelling for young learners
Color palette: warm oranges and reds for fire elements, cool blues for water, earth tones for characters, high contrast for readability
Text (verbatim): "赤壁之战"
Constraints: must be readable at card size; title must be prominent and clear; bullet points must use proper punctuation; all text legible for children
Avoid: violent or scary imagery; overly complex details; small unreadable text; realistic gore; dark or muddy colors
